cards.summary: Select a WHO DAK TB screening algorithm
cards.detail: WHO SMART DAK TB decision TB.B4.DT matched row TB.B4.DT.03 using the supplied facts: age 35 years and risk group not PLHIV. The DAK guidance is to select a screening algorithm and screen for TB with one of the WHO-recommended screening algorithms for the general population and high-risk groups, not including people living with HIV, aged 15 years and older.

source.label: WHO SMART DAK TB v1.0.2-ci-build, TB.B4.DT Screening algorithm

patientFactsUsed.value: Household contact of a person with TB; normalized as not PLHIV

extension.dakAction: "Propose the following screening algorithms: - Parallel screening with any TB symptom and CXR - Sequential positive serial screening with any TB symptom and CXR - Sequential negative serial screening with any TB symptom and CXR - Parallel screening with cough and CXR - Sequential positive serial screening with cough and CXR - Sequential negative serial screening with cough and CXR - Screening with CXR - Screening with mWRD - Screening with any TB symptom - Screening with cough" AND "Select screening algorithm" AND "Perform screening"
extension.reference: Operational handbook - Module 2: screening (1), Chapter 3 and Annexes 1-2
extension.modelGrounding: This card is generated only from deterministic DAK middleware output in the Phase 1 simulation.
